compiled_state.title: Sprint epic selection uses AskUserQuestion without displaying the epic list first
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When /dso:sprint is invoked without a primary ticket ID, the orchestrator should first print a formatted list of epics (in-progress, unblocked, blocked) as visible text, then ask the user to select one. Instead, it jumps directly to AskUserQuestion with options, which truncates the list to 4 items and hides context like blocked epics and the hidden-epics note. The SKILL.md Phase 1 steps 2-3 require printing a numbered list as text output BEFORE asking for input.
